title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 1st June 2026 | TV5 Money

recommendations.note: Weak optics only from absent one-time income; EBITDA margin held 25.1% despite Adcock acquisition; strong US pipeline. Hold if held, no fresh buying at ~900.
recommendations.detail: HOLD and ACCUMULATE between 900-1000. Optics look weak only due to the absence of a one-time income; EBITDA margin held at 25.1% despite the South Africa (Adcock ~35.5% equity) acquisition — a one-time glitch. Strong US pipeline (Everolimus, Bosentan launched); formulation income falling but higher-margin API revenue rising; crop/health-sciences demerger showed an excellent quarter. If already held, hold; no fresh buying right at ~900.
